markdownDescription: Stored source object that specifies the fields to `include` or `exclude` from storage, or `false` to disable stored source. Note: `true` is not supported for vector search indexes. If you omit this parameter, it defaults to `false`. To learn more, see [Define Stored Source Fields in Your Atlas Vector Search Index](https://dochub.mongodb.org/core/avs-stored-source-definition).
description: Stored source object that specifies the fields to include or exclude from storage, or false to disable stored source. Note: true is not supported for vector search indexes.

include.markdownDescription: List that contains the field names or dot-separated paths to the fields to store. By default, Atlas Vector Search also stores the `_id` field.
include.description: List that contains the field names or paths to the fields to store.

items.errorMessage: Field name does not meet MongoDb field naming restrictions. Please see https://www.mongodb.com/docs/manual/core/document/#field-names .

exclude.markdownDescription: List that contains the field names or dot-separated paths to the fields to exclude from storage.
exclude.description: List that contains the field names or paths to the fields to exclude from storage.

items.errorMessage: Field name does not meet MongoDb field naming restrictions. Please see https://www.mongodb.com/docs/manual/core/document/#field-names .
